title: Monday should enable Graphs to reference pivot widgets

posts.author: ShelleyDonovan (Shelley Donovan Ritchie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Other tools allow you to create a pivot off the board and then a graph off the pivot. Why is this not enabled in Monday.com? I can create a pivot, but cannot find out how to create a graph referencing the pivot. Please advise. Other comparable tools allow for this as basic out of box. How do we get this on product roadmap. Needed for financial tracking of budget and savings and just about anything you want to see month to month tracked of planned vs actual.

What are you trying to achieve

board with plan vs actual month by month columns allows you to create pivot showing month by month and then that pivot should enable you to add a graph referencing the pivot. This is basic in Smartsheet, excel, etc. Show plan vs actual month by month.
